name: Weekly settlement ready (money lure)
subject: {{.FirstName}}, your weekly settlement is ready — net $1,847.62
trucking_context: Drivers eagerly check weekly settlements; an email that previews a specific net deposit and asks them to log in to dispute or download replicates real payroll software notifications.
indicators: Sender domain driver-settlements-portal.co does not match any real payroll system
Real settlements are usually posted directly to the carrier's TMS or the driver app — not a generic web portal
Asks for company SSO credentials but is not on the company domain
ACH cutoff pressure is artificial — payroll runs on a fixed weekly schedule
